cedict_en: to string together/to skewer/to connect wrongly/to gang up/to rove/string/bunch/skewer/classifier for things that are strung together, or in a bunch, or in a row: string of, bunch of, series of/to make a swift or abrupt linear movement (like a bead on an abacus)/to move across
banner; pennant (in ancient China) | classifier for buildings (Taiwan pr. [chuang2])/(archaic) curtain hung over boat or carriage windows
to establish; to set up; to found
to bring forth new ideas; to blaze new trails/innovation
to begin an undertaking; to start an enterprise/entrepreneurship
to create; to produce; to write/a creative work; a creation
to talk big; to brag; to shoot off one's mouth/(dialect) to chat idly
hammer/to hammer into shape/weight (e.g. of a steelyard or balance)/to strike with a hammer | variant of 錘|锤[chui2]
variant of 詞彙|词汇[ci2 hui4] | vocabulary/list of words (e.g. for language teaching purposes)/word
